content: Hardened AI agent containers require: process/network/filesystem isolation (table stakes), default-deny egress with explicit allowlist (table stakes), no host kernel sharing for high-assurance (differentiator using Firecracker/gVisor/microVM). Standard Docker alone is insufficient — a kernel vulnerability can yield host escape. Key security controls: --cap-drop=ALL, --no-new-privileges, seccomp-bpf. Credential injection via environment (not filesystem). The domain has converged on: isolated network namespace + explicit egress policy + audit logging as the baseline expectation for any serious sandbox.
